message:
feat(learn): dramatic UI overhaul with world-class glassmorphic design

BREAKING: Complete visual redesign of Learning Hub for premium experience

Lesson Content (lesson-content.tsx):
- Dramatic ambient background with animated floating orbs
- Multi-layer glassmorphic sidebar with 3D depth effects
- Timeline-style lesson navigation with glowing nodes
- Hero section with gradient text and premium typography
- Stunning completion card with multi-layer glow effects
- Premium progress bar with leading glow dot
- Beautiful prev/next navigation cards
- Mobile-first glassmorphic bottom navigation

Landing Page (page.tsx):
- Ambient gradient orbs for atmospheric depth
- Glassmorphic progress card with shimmer effects
- Premium lesson cards with hover micro-interactions
- Quick reference links with gradient backgrounds
- Mobile sticky bottom navigation bar
- Keyboard navigation hints

Commands Page (commands/page.tsx):
- Dramatic ambient background effects
- Glassmorphic search with focus glow
- Category filter chips with gradient states
- Category cards with unique gradient themes
- Beautiful empty state design

Design System:
- Black backgrounds with layered glass panels
- White/opacity text hierarchy (white, white/60, white/40)
- Primary-to-violet-to-emerald gradient accents
- Box shadows with color glow effects
- Smooth 300-500ms transitions throughout
- Scale/translate micro-interactions on hover

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
